description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched gable roof with multiple chimneys and skylights, and is clad in light-colored brick or stone. The front facade is defined by a prominent covered entryway with a gabled roof supported by posts, flanked by large windows that allow ample natural light. The structure is single-story, with a sprawling rectangular footprint and extended wings on either side, suggesting a spacious interior layout. The rear of the bungalow includes a wide set of glass doors and additional windows, providing access to the backyard or patio area. The roof overhangs are deep, offering shade and architectural interest, while the window arrangement is mostly symmetrical on the front and rear, with grouped windows on the sides. The overall design is reminiscent of Craftsman or Ranch styles, emphasizing horizontal lines and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A single-story bungalow with a wide gable roof, prominent covered entry, and symmetrical window arrangements, clad in light brick or stone. Deep roof overhangs and multiple chimneys add architectural detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a gabled porch, symmetrical windows, and two chimneys on the roof.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the deep roof overhangs, large rear windows, and the extended wing on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying wide glass doors, grouped windows, and multiple roof skylights and chimneys.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle showing the secondary entrance or patio doors and the continuation of the gable roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
